Chief Minister M K Stalin, PM Modi, and other leaders have responded, with investigations and medical aid underway for the injured.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/tvk-rally-tragedy-long-delay-overcrowded-what-we-know-so-far/articleshow/124184575.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/tvk-rally-tragedy-long-delay-overcrowded-what-we-know-so-far/articleshow/124184575.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 22:15:29 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1113560" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124184641,imgsize-1113560.cms"/></item><item><title>Accenture fired 11,000+ employees; CEO Julie Sweet warns, exit or upgrade</title><description><![CDATA[Accenture laid off over 11,000 employees globally in three months, citing rapid AI adoption and slowing corporate demand. These cuts are part of an $865 million restructuring, with more exits anticipated as the company aligns its workforce with AI-driven solutions and invests in agentic AI training. Despite the layoffs, Accenture reported a 7% revenue increase.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/accenture-fired-11000-employees-ceo-julie-sweet-warns-exit-or-/articleshow/124160673.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/accenture-fired-11000-employees-ceo-julie-sweet-warns-exit-or-/articleshow/124160673.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 26 Sep 2025 18:52:43 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="38384" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124160682,imgsize-38384.cms"/></item><item><title>India throws BRICS at US wall: EAM defends multilateralism; pushes back on protectionism</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/india-throws-brics-at-the-us-wall/articleshow/124184247.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/india-throws-brics-at-the-us-wall/articleshow/124184247.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 21:50:09 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>CHIDANAND RAJGHATTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="83852" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124184343,imgsize-83852.cms"/></item><item><title>Canada woos US H-1B holders: PM Carney says he will soon roll out an offer</title><description><![CDATA[Canada's Prime Minister Mark Carney announced plans to attract skilled foreign workers, particularly those to be impacted by the US's new $100,000 H-1B visa fee. With 309 runs in the tournament, he needs just 11 more to surpass Kohli's record and 23 to break Phil Salt's. He has also equaled a record for consecutive 30-plus scores.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/ind-vs-pak-abhishek-sharma-on-cusp-of-breaking-rohit-sharma-virat-kohli-and-mohammed-rizwan-records/articleshow/124183082.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/ind-vs-pak-abhishek-sharma-on-cusp-of-breaking-rohit-sharma-virat-kohli-and-mohammed-rizwan-records/articleshow/124183082.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 19:37:32 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="71242" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124183205,imgsize-71242.cms"/></item><item><title>Mid-air panic: Passenger held at Mumbai airport for smoking on flight from Phuket</title><description><![CDATA[A 25-year-old passenger, Bhavya Gautam Jain, was arrested at Mumbai airport for allegedly smoking in a flight lavatory during a Phuket-Mumbai flight on Friday night. Railway, healthcare, and education sectors also saw new initiatives. The government highlighted its vision for self-reliance.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/infrastructure/indias-swadeshi-4g-push-pm-modi-launches-bsnls-indigenous-services-heres-all-you-need-to-know/articleshow/124179908.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/infrastructure/indias-swadeshi-4g-push-pm-modi-launches-bsnls-indigenous-services-heres-all-you-need-to-know/articleshow/124179908.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 14:42:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="37460" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124180430,imgsize-37460.cms"/></item><item><title>'I Love Muhammad' row: What sparked violent protests in UP’s Bareilly? 10 things to know</title><description><![CDATA[Protests over "I Love Muhammad" posters turned violent in Uttar Pradesh. Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath ordered strict action against miscreants. Religious and political leaders appealed for calm. The unrest spread to several other states. Authorities ensured heightened security for upcoming festivals.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/i-love-muhammad-row-what-sparked-violent-protests-in-ups-bareilly-10-things-to-know/articleshow/124176949.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/i-love-muhammad-row-what-sparked-violent-protests-in-ups-bareilly-10-things-to-know/articleshow/124176949.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 11:55:37 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="152910" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124178499,imgsize-152910.cms"/></item><item><title>'Left no chance to loot people': PM Modi attacks Congress in Odisha</title><description><![CDATA[Prime Minister Narendra Modi, addressing a public meeting in Odisha, accused the Congress of looting people and taxing low-income groups, contrasting it with BJP's relief efforts like raising income tax limits and reducing GST. This sparked controversy before the Asia Cup final. India's Suryakumar Yadav faced an ICC fine. Pakistan's Haris Rauf also received a penalty. Naqvi offered to pay Rauf's fine. He shared a Ronaldo video resembling Rauf's gesture. Off-field issues now overshadow the final match.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/how-much-time-do-you-need-pcb-chief-mohsin-naqvi-drops-cryptic-post-ahead-of-india-vs-pakistan-asia-cup-final/articleshow/124181022.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/how-much-time-do-you-need-pcb-chief-mohsin-naqvi-drops-cryptic-post-ahead-of-india-vs-pakistan-asia-cup-final/articleshow/124181022.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 16:44:58 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="163026" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124181153,imgsize-163026.cms"/></item><item><title>New Spin bowling coach! Former India player to take charge at BCCI CoE: When?</title><description><![CDATA[Former India spinner Sunil Joshi is appointed as the new spin bowling coach at the BCCI Centre of Excellence, effective October 1. Bringing extensive coaching experience, he will collaborate with CoE Head VVS Laxman to identify, nurture, and groom spin talent across all age groups, including current Indian team members, replacing Sairaj Bahutale.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/sunil-joshi-set-to-take-charge-as-spin-bowling-coach-at-bcci-coe-from-october-1/articleshow/124180769.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/sunil-joshi-set-to-take-charge-as-spin-bowling-coach-at-bcci-coe-from-october-1/articleshow/124180769.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 16:04:41 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SAHIL MALHOTRA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="106178" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124180813,imgsize-106178.cms"/></item><item><title>Delhi BMW accident case: Accused Gaganpreet Kaur gets bail; court flays paramedics at scene</title><description><![CDATA[Delhi's Patiala court granted bail to Gaganpreet Kaur in the BMW accident case that tragically killed a finance ministry official. However, the court sharply questioned an ambulance's conduct, which arrived at the scene but left within 30 seconds without transporting the injured. It asked if this constituted medical negligence, highlighting the ambulance's duty to assist accident victims.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/bmw-accident-case-delhi-court-grants-bail-to-gaganpreet-kaur-accuses-paramedic-of-negligent-act/articleshow/124181192.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/bmw-accident-case-delhi-court-grants-bail-to-gaganpreet-kaur-accuses-paramedic-of-negligent-act/articleshow/124181192.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 16:32:40 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1404336" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124181189,imgsize-1404336.cms"/></item><item><title>'Voting for DMK is voting for BJP': Vijay accuses parties of having underground dealings</title><description><![CDATA[TVK chief Vijay campaigned in Namakkal, accusing DMK of secret dealings with BJP and vowing to face them in 2026. Authorities are treating the situation with caution amid rising regional tensions.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/europe/lasted-for-hours-denmark-reports-new-drone-sightings-over-biggest-military-base-calls-it-hybrid-attack/articleshow/124179938.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/europe/lasted-for-hours-denmark-reports-new-drone-sightings-over-biggest-military-base-calls-it-hybrid-attack/articleshow/124179938.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 15:20:19 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1374565" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124179941,imgsize-1374565.cms"/></item><item><title>'Pakistan link being probed': Ladakh DGP explains why Sonam Wangchuk was held</title><description><![CDATA[Ladakh DGP briefed on the September 24 violence, where 17 CRPF personnel and over 70 civilians were injured during protests. The controversy stems from an FIR against displaying 'I Love Muhammad' boards, sparking wider protests and national debate.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/bareilly/bareilly-unrest-cleric-tauqeer-raza-detained-after-i-love-muhammad-protest-turns-violent/articleshow/124179463.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/bareilly/bareilly-unrest-cleric-tauqeer-raza-detained-after-i-love-muhammad-protest-turns-violent/articleshow/124179463.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 13:58:43 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI CITY DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="28572" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124179514,imgsize-28572.cms"/></item><item><title>Deadly clash in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa: 17 killed in Pakistan-TTP gunfight</title><description><![CDATA[Seventeen Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan (TTP) militants were killed in a joint operation by security forces in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa's Karak district after they opened fire, injuring three personnel. A curfew was imposed for further operations. Separately, an airstrike reportedly killed 23 civilians, including women and children, in the same province, though no official statement has been issued.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/wanted-in-several-cases-17-killed-after-pakistani-forces-clash-with-ttp-militants-weapons-recovered/articleshow/124179100.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/wanted-in-several-cases-17-killed-after-pakistani-forces-clash-with-ttp-militants-weapons-recovered/articleshow/124179100.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 13:38:52 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1668991" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124179736,imgsize-1668991.cms"/></item><item><title>'Proliferation of trade-restrictive actions': Brics declaration slams Trump tariffs</title><description><![CDATA[BRICS foreign ministers condemned Trump-era US tariffs as trade-restrictive actions disrupting global supply chains and economic stability. Sporting a peach T-shirt, he behaved like any other customer, waiting patiently and enjoying salad, pizza, and Coke for 45 minutes. He interacted with staff and customers, obliging selfies, and briefly discussed election results with a party spokesperson.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/gurgaon/surprise-customer-at-gurgaon-pizzeria/articleshow/124132417.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/gurgaon/surprise-customer-at-gurgaon-pizzeria/articleshow/124132417.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 26 Sep 2025 01:27:56 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>NIKHIL SHARMA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1827447" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124176677,imgsize-1827447.cms"/></item><item><title>'Hum dhund rahe Sharma ji': Cameraman shows Tilak Varma as opener</title><description><![CDATA[India secured a thrilling Super Over victory against Sri Lanka in the Asia Cup 2025 Super Fours clash in Dubai. Arshdeep's tight bowling in the Super Over sealed India's dramatic win, propelling them to the final.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/hum-dhund-rahe-sharma-ji-cameraman-leaves-commentators-confused-by-showing-tilak-varma-as-opener-instead-of-abhishek-sharma/articleshow/124179376.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/hum-dhund-rahe-sharma-ji-cameraman-leaves-commentators-confused-by-showing-tilak-varma-as-opener-instead-of-abhishek-sharma/articleshow/124179376.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 14:08:23 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="73176" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124179543,imgsize-73176.cms"/></item><item><title>'No room for any third party': India at UN rejects Trump's ceasefire claim</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/no-room-for-any-third-party-india-at-un-rejects-trumps-ceasefire-claim-issues-warning-to-pakistan-on-terror/articleshow/124175938.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/no-room-for-any-third-party-india-at-un-rejects-trumps-ceasefire-claim-issues-warning-to-pakistan-on-terror/articleshow/124175938.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 08:51:35 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="669171" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124175942,imgsize-669171.cms"/></item><item><title>Where does power lie in Pakistan? Khawaja Asif admits to 'Hybrid Model'</title><description><![CDATA[Pakistan's defence minister Khawaja Asif defended the nation's "hybrid model" of governance, asserting military and civilian leadership operate "by consensus." He dismissed claims of army dominance, attributing such perceptions to past military rulers, while controversially labeling US democracy a "deep state." Asif maintained this arrangement, though not ideal, is a "practical necessity" for managing Pakistan's crises, despite critics branding it undemocratic.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/asim-munir-more-powerful-than-you-where-does-power-lie-in-pakistan-khawaja-asif-admits-to-hybrid-model/articleshow/124177466.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/asim-munir-more-powerful-than-you-where-does-power-lie-in-pakistan-khawaja-asif-admits-to-hybrid-model/articleshow/124177466.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 12:44:48 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="631656" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124178501,imgsize-631656.cms"/></item><item><title>MP: 4-year-old hacked to death in front of mother; assailant dies after mob attack</title><description><![CDATA[A four-year-old boy was brutally killed in Indore's Aali village. A 24-year-old man attacked the child with a sharp weapon. The boy's mother was also injured while trying to intervene. Villagers confronted the assailant, who was then tied up and assaulted. Police took him to the hospital where he later died. A judicial probe has been ordered into his death.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/indore/four-year-old-hacked-to-death-assailant-dies-after-mob-attack/articleshow/124168427.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/indore/four-year-old-hacked-to-death-assailant-dies-after-mob-attack/articleshow/124168427.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 27 Sep 2025 00:31:15 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TNN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="734200" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124179034,imgsize-734200.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

      <title><![CDATA[Godawari Power & Ispat to conduct internal inquiry into 6 deaths at plant]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/market/godawari-power-ispat-to-conduct-internal-inquiry-into-6-deaths-at-plant-19694088.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[Four officials and two workers were killed in an accident inside a furnace at a private steel plant in Chhattisgarh’s capital Raipur on Friday, while six others, including a general manager, suffered injuries, according to police.]]></description>

      <title><![CDATA[$800 billion revenue shortfall threatens AI future, Bain says]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/technology/800-billion-revenue-shortfall-threatens-ai-future-bain-says-19684213.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[The report is set to raise further questions about the AI industry’s valuations and business model. The increasing popularity of services such as OpenAI’s ChatGPT and Google’s Gemini, as well as AI efforts by companies across the planet, means demand for computing capacity and energy is rising at a rapid clip. But the savings provided by AI and companies’ ability to generate additional revenue from AI is lagging behind that pace.]]></description>

      <title><![CDATA[New GST rates HIGHLIGHTS: 90% of GST benefits will flow to end customers, govt. estimates]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/gst-new-rates-india-live-updates-two-slab-system-september-22-nirmala-sitharaman-gst-2-0-itc-council-reforms-5-18-40-pc-liveblog-19681684.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[New GST rates HIGHLIGHTS: India’s GST framework is set for its biggest overhaul since 2017, with a new two-slab system rolling out from September 22. Most goods and services will fall under 5% or 18%, while luxury and sin goods face higher rates. The move is aimed at easing compliance and bringing simplicity to the indirect tax regime.]]></description>

      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/startup/climate-tech-startup-equilibrium-funding-farmers-carbon-credits-19681631.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[Equilibrium, a climate tech startup, is set to expand its carbon removal projects across nine states in India after raising $3 million in a seed round.
